1 Figures

Excess birth. A. Annual number of births, as observed (red points) and expected (black lines corresponding to the mean posterior and gray area to the 95% credibility interval (95% CrI)), from 2000 to 2025. B. Relative excess birth by year from 2000 to 2025. C. Relative excess birth by month between 2020 and 2025. D. Relative excess birth by citizenship aggregated by region of the world in 2011-2025. E. Relative excess birth by citizenship over years.
